name: Kubernetes API Server Exposed
description: The Kubernetes API server is publicly accessible, potentially allowing cluster enumeration, pod listing, and container escape. This is a critical finding in cloud environments.
author: AC3 ScanForge
remediation: Restrict Kubernetes API access to authorized networks only. Enable RBAC and disable anonymous authentication. Use a VPN or bastion host for cluster management.

intelligence.dfirRelevance: Exposed Kubernetes APIs are increasingly targeted by cryptomining groups and APTs for persistent access to cloud infrastructure. Volt Typhoon and other groups have exploited exposed container orchestration APIs.
